nasb.text: May the Lord judge between you and me, and may the Lord avenge me on you; but my hand shall not be against you.

esv.text: May the Lord judge between me and you, may the Lord avenge me against you, but my hand shall not be against you.

cnv.text: 願耶和華在你我之間判斷是非；願耶和華在你身上為我伸冤。我的手卻不敢傷害你。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华在你我之间判定是非，替我申冤，我却不会动手伤害你。
